_meta.description: ILLUSTRATIVE SAMPLE cross-RFP memory of gap resolutions. Each entry captures a decision about how to handle a recurring kind of gap, so future analyses inherit established practice. The Shortfall Strategist reads this on every run. Copy to data/decisions.json to run the system; the real file accumulates your own decisions and should stay local.

decisions.gap_pattern: Sample: RFP requires a certification we do not hold
decisions.decision: Default to teaming with a partner that holds it; flag [NEEDS_HUMAN] to confirm partner.
